transforms.name: __load__
transforms.result:
<script setup lang="ts" name="StarHorseIcon">
import {computed} from 'vue';

const props = defineProps({
  iconClass: {type: String, required: true,},
  className: {type: String,},
  title: {type: String, default: "",},
  size: {type: String, default: "20px"},
  // 图标是否有边框
  boxShow: {type: Boolean, default: false},
  border: {type: Boolean, default: false},
  color: {type: String, default: "var(--star-horse-style)"},
  cursor: {type: String, default: "default"}
});
const iconName = computed(() => `#icon-${props.iconClass}`);
const svgClass = computed(() => {
  let cls = props.border ? "svg-icon icon-border" : props.boxShow ? "svg-icon icon-cls" : "svg-icon";
  if (props.className) {
    return cls + props.className;
  } else {
    return cls;
  }
});
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
.svg-icon {
  cursor: v-bind(cursor);
  width: v-bind(size);
  height: v-bind(size);
  color: v-bind(color);
  margin-left: 0.35em;
  margin-right: 0.35em;
  vertical-align: -0.15em;
  fill: currentColor;
  overflow: hidden;
  outline: none;
}

.icon-border {
  border-radius: 7px;
  border: 1px solid var(--star-horse-style);
  padding: 3px;
}

.icon-cls {
  background: var(--star-horse-style);
  color: var(--star-horse-white);
  border-radius: 7px;
  padding: 3px;
}
</style>
<template>
  <svg aria-hidden="false" :class="svgClass">
    <use :xlink:href="iconName"></use>
    <title v-if="!!title">{{ title }}</title>
  </svg>
</template>

transforms.name: vite:vue

sourcesContent:
<script setup lang="ts" name="StarHorseIcon">
import {computed} from 'vue';

const props = defineProps({
  iconClass: {type: String, required: true,},
  className: {type: String,},
  title: {type: String, default: "",},
  size: {type: String, default: "20px"},
  // 图标是否有边框
  boxShow: {type: Boolean, default: false},
  border: {type: Boolean, default: false},
  color: {type: String, default: "var(--star-horse-style)"},
  cursor: {type: String, default: "default"}
});
const iconName = computed(() => `#icon-${props.iconClass}`);
const svgClass = computed(() => {
  let cls = props.border ? "svg-icon icon-border" : props.boxShow ? "svg-icon icon-cls" : "svg-icon";
  if (props.className) {
    return cls + props.className;
  } else {
    return cls;
  }
});
</script>
<style lang="scss" scoped>
.svg-icon {
  cursor: v-bind(cursor);
  width: v-bind(size);
  height: v-bind(size);
  color: v-bind(color);
  margin-left: 0.35em;
  margin-right: 0.35em;
  vertical-align: -0.15em;
  fill: currentColor;
  overflow: hidden;
  outline: none;
}

.icon-border {
  border-radius: 7px;
  border: 1px solid var(--star-horse-style);
  padding: 3px;
}

.icon-cls {
  background: var(--star-horse-style);
  color: var(--star-horse-white);
  border-radius: 7px;
  padding: 3px;
}
</style>
<template>
  <svg aria-hidden="false" :class="svgClass" data-v-inspector="src/components/comp/StarHorseIcon.vue:53:3">
    <use :xlink:href="iconName" data-v-inspector="src/components/comp/StarHorseIcon.vue:54:5"></use>
    <title v-if="!!title" data-v-inspector="src/components/comp/StarHorseIcon.vue:55:5">{{ title }}</title>
  </svg>
</template>
